info.description: The /the-work/sessions page hero copy. The cards below the hero come from the Coaching Session collection (one entry per session type).

eyebrow.description: Small uppercase eyebrow above the title.

tagline.default: Ninety minutes. One theme. A clear next step.

intro.default: Not every piece of work needs a twelve-week container. Sometimes you need a focused conversation with someone who can hold the shape of what you are navigating, and help you put it down. A Reset Session is that conversation.
